name: CanvasIntroFloorPolish intro-canvas-video-surface-v175 floor-walk-hit-guard-v175
notes: Startup movie frames are mirrored to a top canvas so native video timelines cannot appear; legacy loading/progress code remains quarantined and empty-floor walking has safer hit handling.
label: Canvas mirrored intro video, no native timeline, safer floor walking
description: Game start remains video-only for at least 3 seconds, with the native video element hidden behind a canvas surface and old loading/progress code paths guarded.
